summary: First iteration full-stack testing for Medici Logici (Doctors-Logicians research site). 12/12 backend pytest tests passed; full frontend e2e flow including admin CRUD, network embed save, auth persistence and logout all working.

minor.issue: ObjectId(payload['sub']) / ObjectId(doctor_id) on auth/me would raise bson.errors.InvalidId (uncaught) leading to 500 if a malformed token sub is supplied. Doctor detail correctly wraps in try/except. Recommend wrapping ObjectId conversion in get_current_user too.

integration_issues.issue: Wrong-credentials response shows no element matching .error/[class*='error'] selector. Backend correctly returns 401, but error message styling may be using a different class (likely inline span). Verify users see a visible error toast/message on failed login.

action_items: (Optional) wrap ObjectId() calls in get_current_user to return 401 instead of 500 on malformed JWT sub.
Verify login error message has data-testid (e.g., 'login-error') and is visible to user when 401 returned.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: bcrypt $2b$ hashing used correctly; seed_admin idempotently updates password when ADMIN_PASSWORD changes.
Cookies set with httpOnly, secure=True, samesite='none' — appropriate for cross-site preview HTTPS; frontend also uses Authorization Bearer header (localStorage) — both paths verified.
Mongo _id correctly excluded from responses via doctor_from_mongo serializer.
CORS: when CORS_ORIGINS='*' allow_credentials=False (correct, browser would reject credentials+wildcard); when explicit origins, credentials enabled.
No brute-force lockout implemented (playbook mentions 5-fail lockout). Currently any number of bad logins return 401 without rate limit — consider adding if required.
server.py is single-file ~410 lines (under 700-line threshold); acceptable for current scope but split routers if growing.
seed_data_creation: Test doctor 'TEST_Doctor' was created and deleted by pytest CRUD test; frontend test created and deleted 'Test Doctor' through admin UI. Network embed in DB was overwritten with sample '<html>...hello</body></html>' / 'Test caption' by both pytest and frontend test; this means /networks now renders that placeholder iframe instead of empty state for future runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers auth, doctors CRUD, network. Network embed in MongoDB was overwritten during testing (db.settings._id='network' now holds '<html><body>hello</body></html>'). To re-test the 'no embed' placeholder on /networks, delete that settings doc first. Seed admin and 3 seed doctors are inserted only when collections are empty.
rca of the issue: No reproducible issues; minor recommendations only.
